feed.emptyScope: No polls at this level yet
feed.emptyScopeHint: Polls appear here when they are created for your area
feed.needResidency: Set your parish to see local polls
feed.loginToSee: Sign in to see polls for your area

vote.title: Your voice
vote.changeHint: You can change your vote at any time
vote.cooldown: Please wait a minute before changing your vote again
vote.outOfScope: This poll is for residents of {name}

consent.title: Before your first vote
consent.p1: Your choice is not published anywhere. It is stored in a depersonalized form: the vote record contains no link to your profile.
consent.p2: You can change your vote, delete all your votes, or withdraw this consent at any time in settings. Aggregated results (totals only) are public.
consent.p3: Honest limits: the server operator could technically re-link votes using a protected server key. This requires a deliberate act and is never done in normal operation. Political opinions are sensitive data (GDPR Art. 9) — we ask for your explicit consent to store them this way.

results.title: Results
results.hiddenHint: The live picture opens after your own vote — so it does not sway you
results.fewVotes: Few votes so far — figures are approximate and update with a delay
results.frozen: Raw votes were deleted after the poll ended (data minimization); these are the frozen aggregates

receipt.ok: Your vote is in the audit chain and the chain is intact
receipt.fail: Receipt not found in the audit chain — contact support

residency.title: My location (civic)
residency.hint: Used only to show polls for your area. Not visible on your public profile.
residency.cooldown: Location can be changed again after {date}

privacy.title: My civic data
privacy.consentGiven: Consent to depersonalized vote storage: given {date}
privacy.eraseMessage: All your opinion votes will be deleted from all polls and your consent will be withdrawn. Aggregate totals will be recalculated. This cannot be undone.

create.territoryHint: Staff only for now: creates a non-binding opinion barometer for residents of the selected territory
create.destinationHint: e.g. "Junta de Freguesia de X, 1 Sep 2026" — polls with a stated recipient get real participation

comments.title: Comments
comments.placeholder: Share your view (this never reveals your vote)

household.title: Household
household.inviteHint: Share this link with family/flatmates — they join your household and can take part in home polls. Generating a new link revokes the old one.
household.joinSuccess: You joined «{name}». Home polls are now in your feed.
household.joinAlready: You are already a member of «{name}».

delegations.title: My delegations
delegations.voiceUsed: Your voice is currently cast in {n} polls via delegation
delegations.created: Delegation request sent — waiting for acceptance
delegations.acceptHint: By accepting you agree that people who delegated to you see your votes in this scope
delegations.hint: Trust someone on a topic or your area — their vote becomes yours until you override it. You can always vote yourself on any specific poll.

ideas.title: Ideas
ideas.hint: Propose a poll for your area. At {threshold} supporters it goes to neutral formulation review and becomes a live poll.
ideas.formBody: What and why (the wording will be neutralized at review)
ideas.empty: No ideas yet — propose the first one
